title: Keepers of the Stones II: Tough As Nails Compat
description: Keepers-of-the-Stones: Tough As Nails mod add-on solves the compatibility issue between Keepers of the Stones II and Tough As Nails mods.
body:
# About
Keepers of the Stones II introduces new mechanics to the game related to the construction and management of settlements, adding new resources, buildings and development opportunities.  

Tough As Nails focuses on making survival more difficult by adding new health, hunger, thirst and fatigue management systems.  

Without the Keepers-of-the-Stones: Tough As Nails add-on mod, these two mods can conflict, causing bugs and instability in the game.  This add-on solves this problem by allowing players to enjoy the benefits of both mods at the same time.

Thanks to Keepers-of-the-Stones: Tough As Nails, you can:
- You will be invulnerable to climatic conditions when you have the power of the elements active
- There will be dirty water in the cursed forest and you will no longer be hot in it
